models.name: Tinyllama
models.description: Ultra-compact 1.1B model. Great for testing and quick Q&A on very low-end hardware.

models.name: SmolLM2 1.7B
models.description: Compact 1.7B model by HuggingFace. Better quality than TinyLlama for edge devices.

models.name: Gemma 3 1B
models.description: Google's smallest Gemma 3 model. Surprisingly capable for its tiny size with a 32K context window.

models.name: Llama 3.2 1B
models.description: Meta's ultra-light 1B model. Fast responses with a generous 128K context window.

models.name: Moondream 2
models.description: Tiny but capable vision model. Image understanding at minimal resource cost.

models.name: Gemma 2 2B
models.description: Google's lightweight 2B model. Fastest CPU inference in its class. Solid general-purpose assistant.

models.name: Llama 3.2 3B
models.description: Meta's efficient 3B model. Most downloaded model on Ollama. Balanced speed and quality.

models.name: Qwen 3 1.7B
models.description: Latest-gen Qwen with hybrid thinking mode. Impressive reasoning for its tiny size.

models.name: Phi-3 Mini
models.description: Microsoft's 3.8B model. Strong reasoning and coding for its size with a 128K context window.

models.name: Phi-4 Mini
models.description: Microsoft's Phi-4-mini. Matches Llama 3.1 8B on MMLU benchmarks. Supports function calling and math.

models.name: Falcon 3 3B
models.description: TII's Falcon 3 3B model. Strong reasoning benchmarks for its size. Good general-purpose chat.

models.name: DeepSeek R1 1.5B
models.description: Distilled reasoning model with visible chain-of-thought thinking. Highly capable reasoning for its size.

models.name: Qwen 2.5 Math 1.5B
models.description: Specialized math model by Alibaba. Trained entirely on mathematics and logic. Outperforms general chat models many times its size on math tasks.

models.name: Starcoder2 3B
models.description: BigCode's 3B model trained on 600+ programming languages. Excellent for fill-in-the-middle code completion.

models.name: Qwen 2.5 Coder 3B
models.description: Qwen's code-specialized 3B model. Best small coding model available. Supports FIM completion across 92 languages.

models.name: Qwen 3 VL 2B
models.description: Compact Qwen vision-language model. Solid image understanding with an impressive 256K context window.

models.name: Qwen 2.5 VL 3B
models.description: Qwen's proven vision-language model. Strong image understanding and reasoning with a 128K context window.

models.name: Llava Phi-3 3.8B
models.description: Lightweight multimodal model fine-tuned from Phi-3 Mini. Good capability for both image and text chat.

models.name: Qwen 3 4B
models.description: Latest Qwen 4B with hybrid thinking mode. Rivals older 7B models on reasoning and code with a massive 256K context.

models.name: Gemma 3 4B
models.description: Google's 4B multimodal model. Strong reasoning and vision support with a 128K context window.

models.name: Qwen 3 VL 4B
models.description: Balanced Qwen vision-language model. Excellent combination of vision and reasoning capabilities.

models.name: MiniCPM-V
models.description: Exceptional at reading text in images (OCR) and detailed chart analysis. Different strength from Qwen VL.

models.name: Nemotron Mini 4B
models.description: NVIDIA's 4B instruction model. Strong personality, natural conversation flow, and solid reasoning.

models.name: Realistic Vision V6
models.description: Photorealistic image generation. Best for people, animals, landscapes, and real-world objects.

models.name: DreamShaper V8
models.description: Fantasy art, portraits, and 3D-style renders. Versatile creative model with rich detail.

models.name: Anything V5
models.description: Anime, illustration, and cartoon-style images. High-quality with clean line art.
